product.name: Face Down Pillow Massage Headrest for Bed, massage pillow on massage table, Piercing Pillows, Sleeping Pillow, Face Cradle After Eye Surgery, memory Removable Cover with Breathable Design, Dark Grey
features: 【High intensity comfort and support】 Our alien pillows provide unparalleled comfort during massage. The specially designed pillow shape and skin friendly pillowcase fabric eliminate pressure on the face, neck, and shoulders, allowing for deeper relaxation and longer comfort during massage, spinal massage, rest, or physical therapy. Memory foam is very supportive, so don't worry about collapse after using it for too long. The pillow has holes around it, allowing for easy breathing through an open nose design.

【Perfect ergonomic design】 The specially designed pillow shape eliminates pressure on the face, neck, and shoulders, allowing for deeper relaxation and longer periods of comfort during massage, spinal massage, rest, or physical therapy. Easily achieve optimal spinal positioning. The unique contour of the pillow gently supports your head and neck, promoting neutral alignment and reducing pressure on your back and neck. This ensures maximum comfort for customers and improves postoperative treatment outcomes.

【Multi functional essential headrest】 Our products are the best solution for massage therapists, chiropractors, physiotherapists, acupuncture and moxibustion and family users. This headrest is perfect for prone treatment, including deep tissue massage, spinal adjustment, back care, facial massage care (attached for use), and general relaxation on a massage table or treatment bed. And other uses, such as beach tanning aids, after eye surgery, or other facial surgeries (to be used according to one's own situation).

【Easy cleaning and quick drying】 The inner memory sponge does not need to be cleaned, just keep it clean during storage. The pillowcase can be hand washed or machine washed, and the quick drying material is convenient for your quick use (hand washing is recommended).

【Thoughtful VIP service and Related product selection】 We provide attentive customer service. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. At the same time, our store offers chest pillows, headrest chest pillow sets, massage oil heaters, and massage stone sets for you to choose from.
